strengths: 19+ years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year minimum, spanning web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Founded GISCollective, an open-source event-driven platform deployed on Kubernetes, demonstrating platform-building and innovation capability
Deep infrastructure expertise through micro-services architecture at scale (Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second), CI/CD systems, and DevOps tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise: current role mentions 'AI-agent infrastructure' without concrete details of AI systems built, trained, deployed, or their impact
Lacks director-level strategic leadership: roles are primarily senior IC and staff engineer focused on hands-on technical work, not customer advisory or strategic direction-setting
Missing preferred advanced degree in AI; holds only BS Computer Science without postgraduate AI/ML specialization

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI expertise and AI products built
Director-level strategic leadership and customer/partner advisory experience
Years of software engineering experience (19+ years)

response.justification: Bogdan is a capable engineer with substantial experience and proven ability to build complex systems and platforms. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' and the resume shows no concrete AI/ML work—only a vague mention of 'AI-agent infrastructure' in his current role without substantive evidence of what was built. The position seeks a director-level strategic leader to advise customers and partners on AI adoption; Bogdan's background is predominantly hands-on technical IC roles rather than strategic advisory leadership. While he would be a strong general staff engineer hire, he lacks the critical AI domain expertise and strategic positioning required for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy.
